title: Go 1.26 Repository, pgx, Migrations, and Reproduction · Go Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss Go decisions for go 1.26 repository, pgx, migrations, and reproduction and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named browser, compiler, network, XML, PostgreSQL, race, load, accessibility, deployment, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for reproducible Go feed-service repository baseline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Capture revision, worktree, configuration, fixtures, secrets, migrations, licenses, and recovery anchor before editing.
Pin Go 1.26.5, pgx v5.10.0, goose v3.27.2, PostgreSQL 18.4, module sums, and supported platforms.
Keep command, application, domain, repository, fetch, parser, scheduler, HTTP, and presentation dependencies directed inward.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Feed Go Clean Gates
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Go team handles case 9529 during a PostgreSQL claim and failover drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile Go, pgx, migration, dependency, clean-build, and artifact evidence; every goroutine, body, row set, transaction, lease, timer, and pool needs named cleanup ownership; then interleave one schedule, lease, fencing, goroutine, cancellation, or shutdown path and prove ownership. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Reproduce format, generated artifacts, migration validation, unit, integration, race, fuzz, vet, vulnerability, build, and smoke evidence from clean state.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Feed Go Clean Gates.
